task: I need to send my teacher a short note because a homework assignment may come in a little late after my evening schedule changed. Can you help me make it brief and school-appropriate, with just enough information to explain the delay?

turns.agent_response:
Sure — here’s a brief, school-appropriate note:

**Hi [Teacher’s Name],**  
My evening schedule changed, so my homework may be a little late. I’m still working on it and will turn it in as soon as I can. Thank you for your understanding.

If you want, I can also make it **more casual** or **more formal**.

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that works. Short and clear.
